title: Yummi Pops de Queso with Butter and Parmesan
ingredients: 4 cups Yummi Pops Maíz y Queso
¼ cup finely grated Parmesan cheese
instructions: Melt the butter in a large skillet over low heat.
Add the Yummi Pops Maíz y Queso and mix gently to coat them evenly without breaking them.
Remove from heat and sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese, mixing lightly so it adheres with the residual heat.
Serve immediately as a warm and flavorful snack to share.
chef_tips: Use very low heat when melting the butter to prevent it from burning or turning bitter.
Add the Parmesan off the heat so it clings without melting completely.
Serve immediately — the Yummi Pops may soften if left to sit for too long.
